Defendants' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Expert Daniel Bornstein And Plaintiffs' Attorneys Of Record, Tenant Law Group And For Sanctions Against Tenant Law Group And Daniel Bornstein
Off Calendar Mar-04-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Eric Toscano; Tenant Law Group, PC; 888-510-7511; appearing in person on behalf of plaintiffs Brenda Oliva, Salvador Ponce, Ashly Perez and Aisha Oliva.
Kristen E. Drake; Tenant Law Group, PC; 888-510-7511; appearing in person on behalf of plaintiffs Brenda Oliva, Salvador Ponce, Ashly Perez and Aisha Oliva.
Aser Tolentino; Tenant Law Group, PC; 888-510-7511; appearing in person on behalf of plaintiffs Brenda Oliva, Salvador Ponce, Ashly Perez and Aisha Oliva.
John Podesta; Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP; 415-433-0990; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendants 3134 24th Street LLC, Hanna J. Azar and Jeries J. Azar.

Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR# 10619, 925-384-0003, raquel@transcriptlegal.com

Plaintiffs contest the court's tentative ruling. The court and counsel discuss the Shadow Traffic Network vs. Superior Court (1994) 24 Cal.App.4th 1067. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS 3134 24TH STREET LLC, HANNA AZAR and JERIES AZAR's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Expert Daniel Bornstein And Plaintiffs' Attorneys Of Record, Tenant Law Group And For Sanctions Against Tenant Law Group And Daniel Bornstein is moot in part and GRANTED in part. Motion to Disqualify expert is moot. Motion to disqualify plaintiff's counsel is GRANTED. Shadow Traffic Network v. Superior Court (1994) 24 Cal.App.4th 1067. Request for sanctions is denied. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR# 10619, 925-384-0003, raquel@transcriptlegal.com (D501)
